description: Retrieves the full risking response for a given application reference, including the overall application status and the risking status of each associated individual. Returns 200 with the response body if found, or 204 No Content if the application reference is not found in the database.

pathParameters.name: applicationReference
pathParameters.description: The unique application reference identifier. Bound as an ApplicationReference value class.

body.status: ApplicationForRiskingStatus enum (ReadyForSubmission | SubmittedForRisking | Approved | FailedNonFixable | FailedFixable | ReadyForResubmission)

individuals.failures: array of Failure objects or null

body.failures: array of Failure objects or null

responses.description: No Content — application reference not found in database.

authentication.notes: Rejects if HMRC-AS-AGENT enrolment is already active on the user.

interactions.action: Invoke AuthorisedAction — verify Government Gateway auth, AffinityGroup.Agent, credential role, absence of HMRC-AS-AGENT enrolment
Query MongoDB for ApplicationForRisking by applicationReference (Filters.eq)
Map ApplicationForRisking to ApplicationRiskingResponse (includes individual risking statuses)
Return 200 OK with ApplicationRiskingResponse JSON, or 204 No Content if not found

externalDependencies.name: HMRC Auth Service
externalDependencies.purpose: Validate Government Gateway credentials and retrieve enrolments/credentialRole/internalId

specialCases: Returns 204 (not 404) when the application reference is not found — callers must handle both 200 and 204.
The response only includes personReference, status, and failures for each individual — not the full IndividualForRisking details.
